name: Financial Services
summary: Security and compliance support for financial services providers operating under significant regulatory scrutiny.
context: Financial services organisations face some of the most demanding security and compliance requirements of any sector. Cyberxperts has supported financial services clients with cybersecurity audits and vulnerability assessments across multiple operating markets, working to frameworks including ISO 27001 and NIST.

name: Healthcare
summary: Protecting sensitive patient data and supporting continuity of care through structured security and compliance assessment.
context: Healthcare organisations manage sensitive personal data under strict confidentiality and continuity expectations. Cyberxperts has conducted ISO 27001 maturity assessments and business continuity and disaster recovery audits across healthcare service providers, including work on behalf of a major medical scheme network.

name: Education
summary: Security support for educational and qualifications bodies managing sensitive learner and institutional data.
context: Educational and qualifications bodies hold significant volumes of sensitive personal and institutional data. Cyberxperts provides ongoing ICT infrastructure monitoring and support, alongside security assessment services, to organisations operating in this space.

name: Government
summary: Network security, compliance, and assessment services for regulators, municipalities, and public sector entities.
context: Cyberxperts has extensive experience working with government regulators and municipalities, including network security assessments, ISO 27001 and NIST maturity assessments, and ongoing ICT infrastructure support. This includes engagements with the National Nuclear Regulator, multiple South African municipalities, and national qualifications and standards bodies.

name: Manufacturing
summary: Network and operational security support for manufacturing and industrial organisations.
context: Manufacturing organisations increasingly depend on connected operational and IT systems, widening the potential attack surface. Cyberxperts provides network security and penetration testing services suited to organisations balancing operational continuity with security requirements.

name: Professional Services
summary: Security and compliance support for professional services firms handling sensitive client information.
context: Professional services firms are entrusted with sensitive client data and are increasingly expected to demonstrate strong security practices as a condition of doing business. Cyberxperts supports professional services clients with compliance, assessment, and managed security services.
